subcategory.title: Tours
subcategory.description: Find and book here the city tour that is tailored to your wishes. A city tour gives you an interesting insight into a city or a specific topic. In most cases, city tours take place on foot. The knowledgeable guide not only lists facts, but also provides background knowledge and answers any questions you may have. The usual anecdotes make a city tour very popular and will remain in your memory for a long time.

gallery.alternativeText: Geneva Bike Taxi Tour: Discover Geneva with a bike taxi while enjoying a relaxed city exploration.
Geneva Tour: Discover Geneva with a bike taxi along the lake. Ideal for groups and kids.
Geneva Bike Taxi: eco-friendly city ride with passenger, bike taxi, and urban environment.
Jet d'eau Geneva: impressive water column at the Geneva lakeside promenade in summer with mountains in the background
Geneva Watchmaker: Beautiful garden with flowers and a giant clock in the center of the city of Geneva.
